<MethodEndpoint

  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshpaymentmethods"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new meshPaymentMethod

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshpaymentmethod.v2.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshpaymentmethod.v2.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshpaymentmethod.v2.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshpaymentmethods486549215"},"examples":{"meshPaymentMethodV2Post":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v2\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshPaymentMethod\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"new-payment-method\",\n    \"ownedByWorkspace\": \"payment-workspace\"\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"displayName\": \"New Payment Method\",\n    \"amount\": 1000.00,\n    \"expirationDate\": \"2025-12-31\",\n    \"tags\": {}\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"201","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshpaymentmethod.v2.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshPaymentMethodV2Post","type":"object"},"examples":{"meshPaymentMethodV2Post":{"value":"{\n  \"kind\" : \"meshPaymentMethod\",\n  \"apiVersion\" : \"v2\",\n  \"metadata\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"new-payment-method\",\n    \"ownedByWorkspace\" : \"payment-workspace\"\n  },\n  \"spec\" : {\n    \"displayName\" : \"New Payment Method\",\n    \"tags\" : { },\n    \"amount\" : 1000,\n    \"expirationDate\" : \"2025-12-31\"\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshpaymentmethods/new-payment-method\"\n    },\n    \"meshprojects\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshprojects?paymentIdentifier=new-payment-method\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
